enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the longing for a beloved, encapsulating the essence of love.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is from the movie Naan Pesa Ninaipathellam, which adds a rich context to its lyrics.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is beautifully sung by the legendary KJ Yesudas, known for his soulful voice.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Yalean Kiliyae was composed by Sirpy, who is known for his melodious tunes.

When was this song released?

This song was released on July 9, 1993, marking it as a classic in Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yalean Kiliyae, the listener is taken on a melodic journey filled with romantic sentiments. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke nostalgia, reminding us of cherished memories. This classic piece remains a favorite for weddings and anniversaries, celebrating the essence of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yalean Kiliyae is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of KJ Yesudas and the soulful composition by Sirpy, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love. Dive into the beautiful lyrics and let the music take you on a heartfelt journey.
stanzaMeanings: O little bird, you sing the music that leads me. There is no day without you singing, oh dear one. There is no day without you singing.
I hear the song of the cuckoo. I want to sing it, but you are not here. Oh dear one, you are not here.
O little bird, you sing the music that leads me. There is no day without you singing, oh dear one. There is no day without you singing.
The cuckoo comes looking for me and brings new songs to sing.
The waves come rushing in and tell the melody. They will clear my worries.
The song that sings to me, even the breeze listens to it. Today, spring will come, and tomorrow my door will open.
O little bird, you sing the music that leads me. There is no day without you singing, oh dear one. There is no day without you singing.
Can you tell me a good news that will make all my sorrows go away? Can you tell me a good news?
With love, will this earth be filled with victory?
Tomorrow will bring a new day.
Everything will change tomorrow, and the moon will also come to the earth.
O little bird, you sing the music that leads me. There is no day without you singing, oh dear one. There is no day without you singing.
I hear the song of the cuckoo. I want to sing it, but you are not here. Oh dear one, you are not here.
